## Role

`roles/<slug>` — add / improve (pick one). If improving: what changed and why.

## Checklist (from CONTRIBUTING.md)

- [ ] Written to the [`AUTHORING.md`](../blob/main/AUTHORING.md) spec, `metadata.spec: 2`
- [ ] Self-scored against the rubric — **rubric: __/18** (ship bar ≥14, no zeros)
- [ ] Worked example numbers reconcile; actual deliverable quoted
- [ ] No idea stated twice; no banned patterns
- [ ] `python3 scripts/lint_roles.py <slug>` passes
- [ ] `python3 scripts/generate_roadmap.py` re-run after `git add`
- [ ] Regulated role → disclaimer blockquote present

## Practitioner status

Do you work / have you worked in this role? (No verification required — good faith. This sets `metadata.maturity`.)

- [ ] Yes — practitioner (`reviewed-by-practitioner`)
- [ ] No — researched draft (`draft`)
